name: plwc-gateway
description: Policy-controlled MCP gateway for PLwC. v0.2.0-rc18.dev9 development validation build (PR-005 privacy-filtered package plus RC18-ALIAS-001 English reflection aliases).
long_description: PLwC Gateway exposes one policy-controlled MCP boundary with the v0.2 eight-tool public facade, Safe Mode, Docker sandbox policy, scoped workspace file access, profile governance, governed workspace operations, document/PDF/ZIP/Office worker operations, governed reflection/governor flows, read-only schema help, local audit logging, and Node.js sandbox execution. This rc18.dev9 development validation build preserves RC18-ONBOARDING-001, packages PR-005 public payload filtering evidence, and folds in RC18-ALIAS-001 English-first reflection marker/trust aliases while preserving canonical PBA2 storage values. The rc18.dev7 build contains RC18-ONBOARDING-001: FastMCP tool metadata carries non-empty descriptions for all eight public facade tools, first-run and describe metadata expose a Claude Desktop bootstrap route using tool_search("plwc") followed by plwc_status(scope="first_run"), public onboarding guidance uses plwc_governor(operation="plan|apply") rather than legacy non-public governor tool names, and governed profile creation reports configured active-profile precedence instead of implying effective activation when Claude Desktop still selects another profile. It preserves the V1-PERSONA-002 persona-layer and onboarding fixes from rc18.dev6, including persona_layer_disabled extension config, disabled persona compile omission, persona-disabled onboarding question suppression, and role/work-context storage in PERSONA.md. It also preserves RC18-ASSET-001 packaging of the 512 x 512 plwc-icon-512.png bundle icon, RC18-CLU-001 deterministic read-only CLU Doctor diagnostics, RC18-QDRANT-001 Qdrant duplicate-heading source-current consistency, RC17-CLU-001 read-only CLU Doctor diagnostics, RC17-INNER-002 Tagebuch canonical date file guards, RC16-WORKSPACE-001 workspace parameter validation diagnostics, and RC17-TEMPERAMENT-001 temperament_write_threshold configuration plumbing. It is not a final public release and the MCPB is not signed. Qdrant remains optional, off by default unless configured, reconstructable, and not a canonical memory source; boot and full compile do not call Qdrant and no automatic reindex is performed.

tools.name: plwc_status
tools.description: Facade for runtime, sandbox, first-run and Claude configuration status via scope=runtime|sandbox|first_run|config.

tools.name: plwc_describe
tools.description: Return read-only PLwC facade schemas, allowed dispatch scopes and operations, required fields, and common denial reasons.

tools.name: plwc_profile
tools.description: Facade for governed profile status, snapshot, retrieval, Tagebuch scan and compile operations; compile defaults to compile_mode=boot, supports working with task_context and optional fresh Qdrant semantic memory, and full for audit/diagnostics.

tools.name: plwc_reflection
tools.description: Facade for governed reflection writes via operation=write with English-first marker/trust aliases, target, candidate_for, evidence and entry_date validation; stored values remain canonical PBA2.

tools.name: plwc_governor
tools.description: Facade for governed profile planning, confirmed apply, retire/list_retirable diagnostics, and Qdrant reindex/drop_index operations.

tools.name: plwc_sandbox_run
tools.description: Facade for Docker-only sandbox execution via lang=python|shell|node; no host-shell fallback. lang=node runs a workspace-relative .js script in a separate plwc-node-runner:0.1.0 image.

tools.name: plwc_workspace_operation
tools.description: Run bounded governed workspace operations: list, search, read, write, file_info, batch_read, create_dir, move, rename, exact_replace, copy (byte-exact file copy), read_binary (returns base64) and write_binary (accepts base64). write with source_path is rejected; use copy.

tools.name: plwc_document_operation
tools.description: Create DOCX/XLSX/PPTX/PDF, run DOCX and XLSX Creation V2, read workspace raster images as MCP image content, run PDF MVP and PDF text-layer operations, inspect/extract/create ZIP files, and inspect/extract Office/OpenDocument files through the governed Document Worker; no conversion, non-ZIP archives, encrypted ZIPs, delete, OCR, macro execution, formula execution, signing, redaction, or form filling.

workspace_path.title: PLwC workspace path
workspace_path.description: Optional workspace directory. Leave empty to use a safe user-scoped PLwC workspace.

profiles_path.title: PLwC profiles path
profiles_path.description: Optional profiles directory. Leave empty to use a safe user-scoped PLwC profiles directory.

active_profile_name.title: Active PLwC profile
active_profile_name.description: Name of the active PLwC profile inside the profiles path. Default: default.

security_config.title: PLwC security config
security_config.description: Optional local security.yaml path. Leave empty to use conservative bundled defaults and user-scoped paths.

memory_write_threshold.title: Memory write threshold
memory_write_threshold.description: Minimum confirmed evidence count before memory writes are proposed or applied. Default: 2.

persona_write_threshold.title: Persona write threshold
persona_write_threshold.description: Minimum confirmed evidence count before persona writes are proposed or applied. Default: 3.

temperament_write_threshold.title: Temperament write threshold
temperament_write_threshold.description: Minimum confirmed evidence count before temperament writes are proposed or applied. Default: 2.

qdrant_enabled.title: Qdrant retrieval index
qdrant_enabled.description: Enable the optional Qdrant semantic retrieval index (off by default). The config-window value is authoritative.

persona_layer_disabled.title: Disable persona layer in compile output
persona_layer_disabled.description: Turn on to omit the PERSONA block from profile compile output by default. Use for Odysseus or other explicit context-injection PoCs; hard gates and governance remain active.
